mapper.select: SELECT convention_id AS conventionId, project_id AS projectId, category, rule_text AS rule, example_good AS exampleGood, example_bad AS exampleBad, confidence, source FROM team_convention WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY convention_id
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO team_convention ( convention_id, project_id, category, rule_text, example_good, example_bad, confidence, source ) VALUES
( #{row.conventionId}, #{row.projectId}, #{row.category}, #{row.rule}, #{row.exampleGood}, #{row.exampleBad}, #{row.confidence}, #{row.source} )
